query: INSERT INTO independent_study_modules (title, description, content, contentSwahili, category, language, `order`, estimatedHours, isPublished, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES ('Wesleyan Theology: A Practical Guide', 'Learn the core principles of John Wesley and Methodist theology in simple, practical language. Understand grace, sanctification, social holiness, and how to live out your faith daily.', 'Wesleyan Theology: A Practical Guide - Lesson 1: God''s Grace Comes First (Prevenient Grace) - God doesn''t wait for us to be perfect before He loves us. He reaches out to everyone, everywhere, all the time. Lesson 2: Becoming More Like Jesus (Sanctification) - Being a Christian isn''t just about going to heaven someday. It''s about becoming a better person every day. Lesson 3: Personal Faith AND Community Responsibility (Social Holiness) - Wesley taught that you can''t have a personal relationship with God while ignoring the suffering of others. Lesson 4: Using Money Wisely (Stewardship) - Wesley believed that how we use money shows what we really believe. Lesson 5: The Power of Small Groups - Wesley believed that spiritual growth happens best in small groups. Lesson 6: Living Out Your Faith Every Day - Wesley''s theology isn''t just about beliefs - it''s about living differently.', 'Teolojia ya Wesleyan: Mwongozo wa Vitendo - Somo 1: Neema ya Mungu Inakuja Kwanza - Mungu hasubiri sisi kuwa kamili kabla ya kumupenda. Anaweza kukamatiana na kila mtu, mahali popote, kila wakati. Somo 2: Kuwa Kama Yesu - Kuwa Mkristo si tu kuhusu kwenda mbinguni siku moja. Ni kuhusu kuwa mtu mzuri kila siku. Somo 3: Imani ya Kibinafsi na Jukumu la Jamii - Wesley alieleza kuwa huwezi kuwa na uhusiano wa kibinafsi na Mungu wakati unazipuuza matatizo ya wengine. Somo 4: Kutumia Pesa Kwa Busara - Wesley aliamini kuwa jinsi ya kutumia pesa inaonyesha kile unachokiamini. Somo 5: Nguvu ya Vikundi Vidogo - Wesley aliamini kuwa ukuaji wa roho hutokea vizuri zaidi katika vikundi vidogo. Somo 6: Kuishi Imani Yako Kila Siku - Teolojia ya Wesley si tu kuhusu imani - ni kuhusu kuishi tofauti.', 'theology', 'English/Swahili', 16, 5, 1, NOW(), NOW())
